Analyst Excel JobsInMass.com <strong>Job Description<br><br></strong><strong>Job Title: </strong>Data Analyst Excel<br><br><strong>Job Type: </strong>Contract<br><br><strong>Location:</strong> Remote<br><br><strong>Job Summary:</strong> In this role, you'll apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. No prior experience in AI is required 芒聙聰 your domain knowledge is what matters.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities<br><br></strong><ul><li>Conduct in-depth data analysis using Microsoft Excel to extract actionable insights and support decision-making across teams.</li><li>Collaborate with project stakeholders to understand data requirements and translate them into meaningful analyses.</li><li>Review, clean, and validate datasets to ensure accuracy, consistency, and integrity.</li><li>Develop clear, concise reports and visualizations to communicate findings to both technical and non-technical audiences.</li><li>Identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities in complex datasets, contributing to strategic initiatives.</li><li>Document methodologies, results, and recommendations with meticulous attention to detail.</li><li>Contribute expertise to enhance data-driven decision-making processes within the customer's team.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Required Skills And Qualifications<br><br></strong><ul><li>Proven experience performing data analysis in a business environment using Microsoft Excel as the primary tool.</li><li>Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy in data processing and reporting.</li><li>Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to clearly articulate analytical findings.</li><li>Demonstrated ability to work collaboratively across teams to drive business outcomes.</li><li>Solid understanding of Excel functions, formulas, and data visualization tools.</li><li>Proficiency in identifying data inconsistencies and implementing corrective measures.</li><li>Experience working in fast-paced, data-driven organizations.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Preferred Qualifications<br><br></strong><ul><li>Experience
